requirements.name: Preferred vendor fast path
requirements.description: Preferred vendor invoices below USD 25,000 route to finance validation.

requirements.name: High-value approval control
requirements.description: Invoices at or above USD 25,000 route to manager approval before finance validation.

requirements.name: Exception screening
requirements.description: Duplicate invoice matches and tax exception flags must override preferred vendor routing.

requirements.name: Audit evidence logging
requirements.description: Every routing decision must record vendor status, invoice amount, threshold applied, and final approval path.

testCases.name: Preferred vendor invoice below threshold routes to finance validation
Preferred vendor invoice requires manager approval
Duplicate invoice override routes to manual review
Tax exception override blocks automated fast path
Boundary invoice captures manager approval and audit evidence
